name: loanDepot
description_short: loanDepot is a mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and home equity loans through physical branch locations and online channels.
description_long:
loanDepot operates as a national mortgage lending company with a physical branch presence, including a Colorado Springs location. The company has been operating in the mortgage space with NMLS licensing (Colorado Springs branch NMLS: 2064740) and maintains a team of licensed loan officers and consultants. Their Colorado Springs branch is located at 7222 Commerce Center Drive and operates during standard business hours with direct phone and email contact options.

The company provides a range of mortgage products including home purchase loans, home refinance options, and home equity lines of credit. They also offer personal loans as an additional product line. The website features mortgage calculators, educational articles about home financing, and integration with home search tools powered by comehome. Customers can contact loan officers directly or apply online through their platform.

loanDepot distinguishes itself through local branch accessibility combined with online application options. The Colorado Springs team includes a branch manager, senior loan consultant, internal loan consultant, and seven additional loan consultants, all with individual NMLS credentials. The company provides educational content on topics ranging from home purchase processes to personal finance matters, suggesting a focus on consumer education alongside lending.

As a traditional mortgage lender, loanDepot serves standard mortgage markets but operates within the competitive landscape of established lenders. The company's strength lies in combining brick-and-mortar branch presence with digital tools, though specific interest rates, APR comparisons, and detailed product terms are not fully detailed on the branch page.
address: 7222 Commerce Center Dr Suite 170, Colorado Springs, CO 80919

company_info.headquarters: 7222 Commerce Center Dr Suite 170, Colorado Springs, CO 80919

pros: Local Colorado Springs branch with in-person loan officer availability at 7222 Commerce Center Drive
Team of 10 licensed loan professionals with individual NMLS credentials and specific expertise
Multiple product offerings including home purchase, refinance, home equity, and personal loans
Online mortgage calculators for quick payment estimates and affordability assessment
Educational content library covering home purchase, refinancing, and personal finance topics
Direct contact options including phone (719-358-5880), email, and online messaging
Integration with home search tools (comehome) for seamless home shopping experience
cons: Specific interest rates and APR terms not displayed on branch website, requiring direct inquiry
Limited transparency on loan origination fees, closing costs, and product-specific terms
No published customer reviews, ratings, or satisfaction metrics visible on the branch page
Personal loan details and lending limits not specified on the website
No information about specialized loan programs (FHA, VA, jumbo, etc.) on the branch page
best_for: Colorado Springs homebuyers seeking in-person consultation with local loan officers
Homeowners interested in refinancing or home equity products with established lenders
Borrowers who prefer traditional branch banking experience combined with online tools
Consumers seeking mortgage education and support through multiple communication channels
diagnosis: loanDepot is best for Colorado Springs residents and regional borrowers who value local branch access combined with online convenience for mortgage and personal lending. Primary consideration: the branch page lacks detailed rate, fee, and product specification information, requiring direct contact with loan officers to compare terms and competitiveness against other lenders.
services: Online mortgage calculator and payment estimator
Direct loan officer contact by phone and email
Branch-based loan processing and closing support
